_comment: Pinned provenance for the OVMF firmware that measured-direct-boots the SecGit guest UKI. The firmware is part of the SEV-SNP launch measurement, so it MUST be built reproducibly from a pinned source and its digest pinned here. Measured direct boot requires the AmdSev target (OvmfPkg/AmdSev/AmdSevX64.dsc), which emits a single OVMF.fd carrying the SNP_KERNEL_HASHES metadata section and enables kernel-hashes=on at launch; the stock OvmfPkgX64.dsc build will NOT work. HOW TO FILL: run `EDK2_COMMIT=<reviewed-sha> deploy/guest/build-ovmf.sh` on a Linux host; it builds OVMF.fd reproducibly and writes edk2_commit + sha384_hex back into this file. deploy/snp-inputs.example.json references this file and deploy/guest/build-guest.sh binds the digest into snp-reference.json.
note: kernel-hashes=on must be set on the sev-snp-guest QEMU object so the kernel/initrd/cmdline hashes are folded into the launch measurement. See docs/acceptance-snp.md and docs/packaging.md.
